input.label: Index Metric:
input.choice: final size of compressed raw data

chart.title: Index Tasks
chart.searchTemplate: index=_perf_report type=index metric=$metricIndex$ | CHART avg(value) BY _time, task

table.title: Index Tasks
table.searchTemplate: index=_perf_report type=index metric=$metricIndex$ | CHART avg(value) BY _time, task

chart.title: Search Tasks (not Parallel)
chart.searchTemplate: index=_perf_report type=search (NOT race) metric=$metricSearch$ | CHART avg(value) BY _time, task

table.title: Search Tasks (not Parallel)
table.searchTemplate: index=_perf_report type=search (NOT race) metric=$metricSearch$ | CHART avg(value) BY _time, task

chart.title: Search Tasks (Parallel)
chart.searchTemplate: index=_perf_report race metric=$metricSearch$ | CONVERT ctime(_time) AS timeStr | EVAL timeAndTaskAndRace = timeStr . ", " . task . ", " . race | CHART min(value), median(value), max(value) BY timeAndTaskAndRace

table.title: Search Tasks (Parallel)
table.searchTemplate: index=_perf_report race metric=$metricSearch$ | CONVERT ctime(_time) AS timeStr | EVAL timeAndTaskAndRace = timeStr . ", " . task . ", " . race | CHART min(value), median(value), max(value) BY timeAndTaskAndRace

table.title: All Stats
table.searchTemplate: index=_perf_report task (NOT race) | CONVERT ctime(_time) AS timeStr | EVAL timeAndTask = timeStr . ", " . task | CHART avg(value) BY timeAndTask, metric
